rewrite_verification.notes: IR copy and dropdown values now match drsam-99657.bubble ai_RNbBHYYB/C/F/G/L: title Notifications, subtitle, Check-In Reminder Frequency label, Select frequency placeholder, three Bubble choice strings (Daily/Weekly/Never with em-dash descriptions). NOTIFICATION_FREQUENCY_OPTIONS stores display text in notification_frequency_text — no invented slug enum. data-bubble-id restored on ai_RNbBHYYB, ai_RNbBHYYC, ai_RNbBHYYF.

criteria_audit.notes: Independent Bubble re-read confirms static copy and ai_RNbBHYYG choices match implementation; dropdown value/onboarding_data key uses IR display strings
saveNotificationFrequency merges notification_frequency_text into profiles.onboarding_data; handleSave reloads saved value and shows toast

functional_audit.check: loadNotificationFrequency reads notification_frequency_text from profiles.onboarding_data with IR default fallback
Save Notification Settings persists frequency and reloads bound select state
Frequency select binds Bubble choice display text (not slug enum) as option values

IR subtitle copy matches Bubble; IR style_ref Text_small_ but code uses Text_body_muted_

Text_label_ style_ref; IR copy Check-In Reminder Frequency

gaps: notifications-freq-group (ai_RNbBHYYE) wrapper lacks data-bubble-id; freq label and select are direct children of ai_RNbBHYYD

critiques.finding: Several in-scope style_ref targets from IR (Group_card_, Text_heading_2_, Text_small_, Dropdown_default_) are mapped to different bubbleStyle tokens than inventory.json specifies for ai_RNbBHYXz/B/C/G.
critiques.alternative: Align notifications tab tokens with IR style_ref rows (match SettingsProfileTab pattern for card/title/subtitle) and apply Dropdown_default_ on the frequency SelectTrigger.

critiques.finding: notifications-freq-group (ai_RNbBHYYE) is flattened: no wrapper marker and save button DOM parent differs from Bubble hierarchy under ai_RNbBHYYD.
critiques.alternative: Add a freq-group div with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYYE wrapping label+select, and nest the save button inside ai_RNbBHYYD to match IR parent_element_id chain.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-fix AC-2 failures (slug enum, missing title/subtitle markers) although B-1 rewrite is now resolved in code.
